resources.string: Phuqhayaña checkout jan qalltañ atititi — alxiri janir phuqhayaña configuración tukuyaspat
Mä comando qillqam jan ukax thaqham...
Choose which marketplace events send you notifications. Disabled topics are still recorded in your inbox.
Suspension, ban, and reactivation notices for your account.
Capability and payout changes on your connected Stripe account.
An auction you bid on has been cancelled.
An auction you bid on or watched has closed.
Another bidder has placed a higher bid than yours.
A new bid was placed on one of your auctions.
Decisions on listings you posted or appealed.
New messages from buyers or sellers in your threads.
Shipping, delivery, dispute, and refund updates on orders you placed.
New orders, dispute openings, and refund requests on items you sell.
Updates on reports you have filed.
Notices when a report names you as the target.
New reviews written about you by buyers or sellers.
Replies to reviews you have written.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you bought.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you sell.
Activate your account to start buying and selling.
Listingax automáticamente uñakipatani ukat inas moderador aprobación munaspa mayni apnaqirinakar uñstayañataki.
Alxiriri uñakipankamax imantatawa, jan ukax 14 urut qhipa.
Jutïr alirinakar yanapt\'aña — aka pedido kunjam sarakänx apkataña.
Inglés ukar jaqukipam, ukatx bullet pointjam uñstayam.
Akax {0} activa {1, plural, one {subscription} other {subscriptions}} jichha facturación periodo tukuyatakix jaytayani. Suscriptoranakax yatiyatani. Listingax alirinakar imantatani.
Suscripcionanakax mayamp ututayata alaqañanakawa — aljirinakax mayamp phaxsi jan ukax mayamp mara chanitamp listing lurapxi.
Yaqhip lurawinakaxa, machaqa aljañanaka uskuña ukhamaraki orden tukuyañanaka, jark\'atawa cuenta aka jakawiruxa.
Mä jila qullqi jichha ofertat sipansa uskuma
Janiwa navegador utjkiti pago jana jist\'arañataki
Stripe cuenta chikt\'ayama akhamarakï aljañataki qullqi katuqañataki.
Plataforma pagäwi: %1$s%%. Stripe panel uñjma procesador pagäwinakatakixa.
Taqpacha qullqi jakhunaka. Mercado filtrxa aljañankir qullqina lurasi.
Aka aljiriruxa jark\'atawa. Machaqa ordennakaxa janiwa uskuñjamäkiti.
Aka aljirixa suspendisitawa. Machaqa ordennakaxa sayt\'atapinïwa cuenta wasitat machaqachañkamaxa.
Machaqa aljaña ukaru limt\'asma nayrïri yänakama uskuñataki.
Mä aljiriru qillqayasta (jan ukax mä alirixa jumaru qillqayätam) uka chikancha akana uñstaniwa.
Bancomam aka aljañ kutt\'ayañ mayisi. Stripe aljirimpi sasiwi apnaqaski; aski tukuyawi akankani kunapachatix amtataspa ukha.
Alirinakax alxirinakax mä aljaña tukuyatatxa pä toqit arxatasipxañapa.
Mä tukuyat aljaña jist\'arasin arxata qillqt\'aña.
Stripe pagad qullqinakax Stripe panilamanx uñacht\'ayatawa.
Kuna aljañatakis qhipharu imañataki marka chimpu lluphintaña.
Pagad katuqañ qalltañatakix Stripe wakichawi tukuyañama.
Jutïr alañanakanxa pachpaki phuqhasini qullqi phuqhañ chinjäwi yapxatata ukhaxa.
Factura ukhamaraki impuesto phuqhañataki apnaqasi. Janiw taqir uñjañ perfilamanxa uñstkiti.
Stripe chinjaña yänaka aljaña qalltañataki ukhamaraki qullqi katuqañataki.
Mä aljiri cuenta uñstayaña yänaka aljañataki ukhamaraki alasirinakaru puriñataki.
Akanwa juk\'ampi aljiri cuenta ajllinaka uñstani utjkani ukhaxa.
Aljiri perfilma uñstayaña qullqi janïr chinjkasina.
Aljiri wakichäwimaxa phuqhatawa. Akanxa Stripe apnaqasma jan ukax cuentamana qhipa kankañapa uñjasma.
Yänaka qillqañ qalltañataki aljiri perfilam luram
Alasirinakat pagonak katuqañataki mä Stripe cuenta chinuñma
Stripex juk\'amp información munaski pagonaka katuqañatak. Stripe Dashboard ukan requirimientonak phuqham, ukatx Estado uñjam clic luram.
